text.message: Black has the wood u need and u solo me
Lmao how am. I most stolen from. I have no ore.
Look at the lad with a city and about to settle on a brick port
Oj and blue both did steal from me.
Jesus. Giving that trade to black who has road locked and has all resources is crazy.
If y'all decide to waste my time I'll return the favour mate.
